$comment: Layer B selection cases for SENIOR vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. The SET SENIOR TO TRUE flag write is gated by WS-AGE >= 65; a candidate that reads the boundary as > 65 misses the exactly-65 senior, so the age-65 case flips both SENIOR and DISCOUNT and catches it. Cases cover a clear senior, the 65 boundary, just-under, a half-cent ROUNDED discount, a young non-senior, and a senior with zero amount.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 SENIOR (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-senior)
